data.description: Futures for oil drop more than $1, Brent hits $69.62, WTI at $64.18.

data.title: Rocket Lab launches 81st Electron rocket, completes 2nd launch in 8 days, deploying Korean Earth-imaging satellite.
data.description: Rocket Lab Corporation, a prominent player in launch services and space systems, achieved a milestone on Jan. 29, 2026, by launching its 81st Electron rocket. This marked the Company's second successful launch within just eight days. The mission involved deploying a satellite for an Earth-observation constellation associated with the Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology (KAIST), a top-tier Korean university focused on science and technology.

data.title: Envision Energy partners with REE Group for 128MW nearshore wind projects in Vietnam's Vinh Long Province.
data.description: Envision Energy, a renowned company in green technology, recently inked a turbine supply deal with Vietnam's REE Group for a significant project in Vinh Long Province. The project, totaling 128MW, comprises V1-3 Phase II with 48MW and V1-5&6 Phase. This agreement marks a significant step towards renewable energy development in the region.

data.title: Anfield Energy amends credit facility with Extract, allows acquisition of B.R.S. Inc; significant agreement details disclosed.
data.description: Vancouver, BC, on Jan. 29, 2026 - Anfield Energy Inc. (TSX.V: AEC; NASDAQ: AEC; FRANKFURT: 0AD) has announced the signing of an amending and consent agreement with Extract Advisors LLC to modify the terms of its existing credit facility. This agreement follows Extract's approval of Anfield's proposed acquisition of all securities of B.R.S. Inc. The Credit Facility was initially mentioned in press releases on October 6, 2023, April 17, 2024, and March 18, 2025. The Consent paves the way for the Acquisition, marking a significant development for the Company.
Bitcoin falls 3.7% to $81,287.11, its lowest level since November 21.

data.title: Faraday Future delivers FX Super One vehicles in UAE for advancing 2026 goals, in collaboration with UAE Chinese General Chamber of Commerce and Blue Sea Auto.
data.description: In Ras Al Khaimah, UAE, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI), a California-based global intelligent electric mobility company, conducted an FX Super One co-creation delivery event for the UAE Chinese General Chamber of Commerce and local automotive service provider Blue Sea Auto. This signifies the company's commitment to the Middle East market.
Silver falls more than 5%, trading at $109.89/oz.
Japan’s Nikkei share average extends losses, down 0.72%.

data.title: Apple iPhone ASP hits $1000 in Q4 2025, with global smartphone shipments reaching 1.26 billion units, Apple shipping 242.8 million units, growing 9.9% YoY, and securing 19.3% global market share, up from 18.1%.
data.description: In an announcement made today by Smart Analytics Global (SAG), it was revealed that global smartphone shipments hit 1.26 billion units in 2025, marking a 2.6% increase compared to the previous year. The report also disclosed that Apple secured the top spot as the leading smartphone vendor globally in 2025, shipping 242.8 million units, reflecting a 9.9% growth from the previous year. Apple's market share rose to 19.3% in 2025, up from 18.1% in 2024.

data.title: Kyivstar Group Ltd. announces pricing of secondary offering of 12,500,000 common shares at USD 10.50 per share.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, Kyivstar Group Ltd. revealed the pricing details of a public offering involving 12,500,000 common shares at a price of USD 10.50 per share. The offering is being executed by VEON Amsterdam B.V. and other selling shareholders, with the option for underwriters to buy an additional 1,875,000 common shares within 30 days at the same price, minus fees. Kyivstar, a top digital operator in Ukraine, clarified that they are not partaking in the sale of common shares in this event.
Sterling declines 0.6% to $1.3735 against the dollar.
Euro falls 0.6%, trading at $1.18965.

data.title: $400 million linked to Helix Darknet Mixer seized by US authorities for processing illicit Bitcoin funds on dark web.
data.description: Authorities have disclosed that a significant sum of money, amounting to hundreds of millions of dollars in Bitcoin, was handled by the mixer. Prosecutors have alleged that these funds were related to illegal transactions conducted on the dark web.
